title: Factory Direct in Shaoxing: Why Textile Access Matters
excerpt: Being near China Textile City helps resort wear brands source faster, sample faster, and keep landed costs sharper.
author: Aloha and Co

sections.title: Direct Textile Access
paragraphs: Shaoxing is home to China Textile City, one of the largest textile trading hubs in the world. For resort wear, that access matters because fabric choice affects drape, print clarity, breathability, and final price.

sections.title: Fewer Handoffs
paragraphs: Factory-direct work removes unnecessary trading-company layers. Sourcing, sampling, production, QC, packing, and shipping can stay under direct oversight, which reduces confusion and improves speed.

sections.title: Cost Control
paragraphs: Direct fabric access does not just make sourcing faster. It also helps keep quotes sharper when brands need to balance low MOQ testing with wholesale margin.
